title: Medieval Realism
description: A modpack designed at providing you the one of the best visually overhauled, medieval survival experience.
body:
**This modpack aims at adding an extensive amount of quality medieval themed mods, and editing the terrain to create a near-fantasy like world.**

**Features:**
- New Medieval Themed Armour
- Netherite Horse Armour
- Horse Tweaks
- Ice And Fire (Dragons, Cyclopes, Fantasy Mobs, ect.)
- Better Combat / Tweaks
- Immersive First Person
- Dehydration
- Health Based Eating (No Hunger Bar)
- Farmers Delight (New Food)
- Mob Variations / Natural Mobs
- Dungeons
- Medieval Structures / Buildings
- Medieval Decoration Blocks
- Toggleable PVP
- Village + Villagers Revamp
- Better End Cities + Dragon Fight
- Simple Voice Chat

**Biome / Terrain Overhauling:**
- Regions Unexplored
- Terralith


**Dragon Galore:**
![Ice and Fire Dragon Flying Towards Camera](https://i.imgur.com/mLDLYqw.gif)

**Medieval Weapons:**
![Player Swinging A Longsword In First Person](https://i.imgur.com/nlkGsfJ.gif)
![Player Swinging A Mace In First Person](https://i.imgur.com/RGhnxft.gif)
